title: VistA Evolved Security Key Translation Table
description: Human-readable names, descriptions, and department mappings for VistA security keys from File #19.1. Used when VistA's own DESCRIPTIVE NAME (field .02) is empty. Source: VHA Kernel documentation + package manuals.
rules: VistA field .02 DESCRIPTIVE NAME always wins if populated
This table is the fallback for keys with empty .02
NEVER expose raw key names (e.g. A1AX APVCO) to end users
Keys marked 'visibility: standard' appear in default admin view
Keys marked 'visibility: advanced' appear only in advanced view

PROVIDER.name: Clinical Provider
PROVIDER.description: Identifies user as a healthcare provider. Required for signing orders and clinical documentation.

ORES.name: Sign & Release Orders
ORES.description: Allows signing and releasing clinical orders to pharmacy, lab, and radiology. Typically assigned to licensed physicians.

ORELSE.name: Release Other's Orders
ORELSE.description: Allows releasing orders written by another provider. Used by supervising physicians and nurse practitioners.

OREMAS.name: Enter Orders for Provider
OREMAS.description: Allows non-providers (clerks) to enter orders that require provider signature later.

ORESNOAPPT.name: Provider Without Scheduling
ORESNOAPPT.description: Allows writing orders for patients without a scheduled appointment.

OR CPRS GUI CHART.name: CPRS Chart Access
OR CPRS GUI CHART.description: Grants access to the clinical patient record system chart view.

ORCL-SIGN-NOTES.name: Sign Clinical Notes
ORCL-SIGN-NOTES.description: Allows signing clinical notes and progress notes.

ORCL-PAT-RECS.name: View Patient Records
ORCL-PAT-RECS.description: Grants read access to patient records in the clinical system.

ORCLINIC.name: Clinic Manager
ORCLINIC.description: Manage clinical settings and clinic-level configuration for CPRS.

CPRS CONFIG.name: CPRS Parameter Editor
